name: poc8004-scripts
description: Utility scripts for ERC-8183 and APEX Evaluator contracts

scripts.help:
echo '=== ERC-8183 & APEX Evaluator Scripts ===
  get-job              - Get ERC-8183 job & assertion
  get-job-claim        - Get job claim & verify
  settle-job           - Settle single assertion
  settle-jobs          - Settle ALL ready jobs (batch)
  dispute-job          - Dispute assertion
  resolve-dispute      - Resolve disputed job
  get-settlement       - Get settlement details
  initiate-assertion   - Manually initiate assertion

Usage: npm run <script> -- <jobId>'
